entity.summary: Fully on-chain central-limit-order-book decentralized exchange on Monad with self-custodial spot markets, immutable market contracts, and composable on-chain matching.
entity.notes: Current first-party application, documentation, market parameters, and fee schedules remain available. HEI uses limited status because independent current metrics report historical cumulative fees but zero recent fee windows and do not establish sustained current trading volume.

evidence.title: Crystal Exchange overview and deployed markets
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Crystal as a fully on-chain Monad CLOB and documents self-custodial trading, composability, immutable contracts, and deployed market parameters.

evidence.title: Crystal Exchange protocol profile and fee metrics
evidence.notes: Independent profile identifies the Monad on-chain order-book exchange and records cumulative protocol fees, while current 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour fee windows are zero; limited status avoids overstating current usage.
